narrative:
Washington A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 491 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
